title: Average tip rate: pre-tablet vs. post-tablet POS (2025 dollars)

source.name: Digital Tipping and Nudge Behavior in Point-of-Sale Systems
source.publisher: Cornell Center for Hospitality Research / Toast Inc.

notes: Illustrative; pre-tablet era uses 2011 cash/paper register average; post-tablet uses 2025 touchscreen POS average. Default buttons on tablet POS systems moved from 15/18/20% to 18/20/25%.
